author: vedmukul
task: Session: Calendar Export, Supabase Persistence, Lab Timelines, and Clinical Calm Redesign
approaches: Supabase for persistent data storage (dual-write with localStorage fallback)
Anonymous device IDs (no auth) for Row-Level Security
Google Calendar URL API for direct calendar links (no .ics downloads)
Clinical calm aesthetic with warm neutral palette
decisions: Used Supabase instead of extending localStorage TTL for persistent history
Google Calendar direct links instead of .ics file downloads
Per-dose calendar events — each medication timing slot gets its own event
3-tier progressive disclosure: Summary+Warnings always visible, Meds/Tasks/Appointments collapsed with preview, Labs/Imaging/Vaccines compact accordion
Warm amber accent for warning signs instead of aggressive red
Overlay chat drawer with backdrop instead of content-pushing sidebar
Questions mini-card floated near top of page, not buried at bottom
Merged addon into main for Vercel production deployment at medlablingo.vercel.app
currentState: Clinical calm redesign complete. All features built, tested, and deployed. Results page has progressive disclosure, grouped sidebar (ESSENTIALS/DAILY CARE/RECORDS), overlay chat, warm aesthetics. Calendar export uses direct Google Calendar URLs. Supabase persistence active with anonymous device tracking. History page at /history with lab sparkline charts.
nextSteps: Upload real NICU discharge summary to test full progressive disclosure flow
Verify Supabase data persistence across browser sessions
Add unit tests for generateICS calendar utilities
Consider adding Apple Calendar / Outlook calendar URL support alongside Google
Potentially add lazy rendering for below-fold sections via Intersection Observer
Review mobile responsiveness of the redesigned results page
